prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that implement the listener manager: the listener addition/removal API, the listener drain mechanism, the connection handler assignment to worker threads, and the listener socket sharing between workers.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the envoy-service-mesh fixture.
